audit_label: PUBLIC AUDIT v0.1 — Case Study #1. Generated from currently verified public evidence. Not a declaration of final canonical strategy.
canonical_positioning: Noetfield Systems Inc. is not a single product. It is an AI-native systems company and product studio that builds, operates, and commissions governed AI products, custom motors, and specialized workflows on shared execution infrastructure.

case_study.title: Noetfield Systems Inc. — Self-Audit Case Study
case_study.story: Noetfield Systems Inc. is the parent operating company behind three commercial product lines. This case study applies Noetfield's Investor Workflow method to the company itself — demonstrating how claims, evidence, gaps, timeline, and roadmap appear in a live diligence profile.

commercial_fields.name: Enterprise AI Governance
commercial_fields.summary: Measure, govern, and optimize AI usage, cost, risk, and execution across institutional systems.

commercial_fields.name: Custom AI Motors & Operating Workflows
commercial_fields.summary: Build private workflow motors and governed execution systems around a company's actual processes, tools, people, and policies.

commercial_fields.name: Investor Workflows & Evidence-Based Audits
commercial_fields.summary: Audit companies, separate claims from evidence, diagnose gaps, manage diligence, and govern investment decisions.

shared_internal_layer.name: Noetfield Governed Execution Layer
shared_internal_layer.summary: Internal governance and execution substrate underlying Noetfield products and commissioned systems. Not offered as a public protocol in v0.1.

findings.claim: Noetfield Systems Inc. operates three distinct commercial product lines (Enterprise AI Governance, Custom AI Motors, Investor Workflows).

evidence.description: Three fields defined in locked company strategy and this public case study.
Enterprise AI governance content live on current public site (one field surface today).

gaps: Corporate homepage does not yet present all three fields equally.
Dedicated /motors and /investor-workflows routes not yet live.
corrective_actions: Rebuild corporate homepage with three-field architecture.
findings.capital_or_dependency_required: Site rebuild capacity (Lane C); not blocked on funding.

findings.claim: The current noetfield.com public site represents one commercial offer (Enterprise AI Governance), not the full identity of Noetfield Systems Inc.

evidence.description: Live site content is enterprise AI governance / GEL narrative.
Additional enterprise contract surfaces on SourceA domain.

gaps: Site does not yet reflect motors or investor workflow product lines.
findings.next_milestone: Corporate homepage v1 with three-field navigation.

findings.claim: Noetfield defines a governed execution loop: Observe → Audit → Diagnose → Prioritize → Execute → Verify → Receipt → Improve.

evidence.description: Execution loop documented in company strategy and LinkedIn investor workflow thesis.

gaps: Full end-to-end autonomous execution chain remains under commissioning.
Mobile command interface and contiguous receipt chain not yet publicly demonstrated.
corrective_actions: Complete mobile-to-motor execution loop with public receipt demonstration.
findings.next_milestone: Verified mobile-to-motor execution with contiguous receipts.

findings.claim: Noetfield can publish honest public self-audits using the same Investor Workflow format offered to external users.

evidence.description: This public evidence bundle (Case Study #1) demonstrates the format.

gaps: Independent external verification of audits not yet established.
Free external audit entry (/audit/start) not yet productized.
corrective_actions: Ship proof page to production URL.
Productize /audit/start for external companies and deals.
findings.next_milestone: Proof page live + first external audit request handled.

timeline.event: Investor Workflow thesis articulated: Audit → Diagnose → Prioritize → Execute → Verify → Receipt.
Repo authority and NOOS control panel path verified on disk.
SourceA canonical path confirmed; library archive paths classified separately.
Company strategy blueprint revised with advisor corrections; case study model locked.
Case Study #1 (Noetfield Systems Inc.) draft finalized for execution — PUBLIC AUDIT v0.1.

gaps_summary: Corporate site does not yet reflect three-field company identity.
Full governed execution chain under commissioning.
External free audit product (/audit/start) not yet live.
Additional case studies (SourceA, SourceB) planned but not yet published.

milestones.name: Public proof page live (Case Study #1)
milestones.unlocks: Credible LinkedIn follow-up; live demo of Investor Workflow format.

milestones.name: Mobile command interface for Noetfield Motor
milestones.unlocks: Verified mobile-to-motor execution with contiguous receipts.

milestones.name: Corporate homepage rebuild (three fields)
milestones.unlocks: Public site matches company identity; enterprise content at /enterprise.

milestones.name: Free external audit at /audit/start
milestones.unlocks: Field 3 productized; first non-self case study.

milestones.name: Case Study #2 — SourceA published
milestones.unlocks: Portfolio diligence folder expands; product demo depth.

integrity.note: Replace COMPUTE_AT_PUBLISH with sha256 of canonical JSON (excluding integrity.digest) at deploy time.

exclusions_note: This public bundle excludes: private repository names, credentials, internal filesystem paths, private commit metadata, security architecture, personal data, undisclosed commercial information, and raw internal prompts or agent traces.
